name: snapchat-marketing
description: Reads Snapchat Marketing (Ads API) organizations, ad accounts, campaigns, ad squads, and ads via the OAuth2 refresh-token grant.

risk.read: external Snapchat Ads API read of organizations, ad accounts, campaigns, ad squads, and ads under the configured organization/ad-account ids
risk.approval: none; read-only, no reverse-ETL write surface

conformance.reason: custom-auth-only (mode:custom AuthHook, no when-gated non-custom fallback); hook-covered, proven live by internal/connectors/paritytest/snapchat-marketing (the AuthHook's real OAuth2 refresh-grant path) -- conformance's synthetic config has no real token_url/refresh_token round-trip and cannot exercise mode:custom auth at all, so every auth-resolving dynamic check would otherwise fail identically and uninformatively
